changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET process_instance_id = ( SELECT MAX(pdi.camunda_process_instance_id) FROM camunda_process_json_schema_document_instance pdi WHERE pdi.json_schema_document_id = bbi.building_block_document_id ) WHERE bbi.process_instance_id IS NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET caller_process_definition_id = ( SELECT MAX(hv.PROC_DEF_ID_) FROM ACT_HI_VARINST hv WHERE hv.NAME_ = 'buildingBlockDocumentId' AND hv.TEXT_ = CAST(bbi.building_block_document_id AS VARCHAR(36)) ) WHERE bbi.caller_process_definition_id IS NULL AND bbi.activity_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET caller_process_definition_id = ( SELECT MAX(hv.PROC_DEF_ID_) FROM ACT_HI_VARINST hv WHERE hv.NAME_ = 'buildingBlockDocumentId' AND hv.TEXT_ = CAST(bbi.building_block_document_id AS CHAR(36)) ) WHERE bbi.caller_process_definition_id IS NULL AND bbi.activity_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET caller_process_definition_id = ( SELECT MAX(rv.PROC_DEF_ID_) FROM ACT_RU_VARIABLE rv WHERE rv.NAME_ = 'buildingBlockDocumentId' AND rv.TEXT_ = CAST(bbi.building_block_document_id AS VARCHAR(36)) ) WHERE bbi.caller_process_definition_id IS NULL AND bbi.activity_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET caller_process_definition_id = ( SELECT MAX(rv.PROC_DEF_ID_) FROM ACT_RU_VARIABLE rv WHERE rv.NAME_ = 'buildingBlockDocumentId' AND rv.TEXT_ = CAST(bbi.building_block_document_id AS CHAR(36)) ) WHERE bbi.caller_process_definition_id IS NULL AND bbi.activity_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET root_building_block_instance_id = ( SELECT COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) FROM building_block_instance parent WHERE parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id ) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL

UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET root_building_block_instance_id = ( SELECT COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) FROM building_block_instance parent WHERE parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id ) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL

UPDATE building_block_instance bbi SET root_building_block_instance_id = ( SELECT COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) FROM building_block_instance parent WHERE parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id ) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE building_block_instance bbi INNER JOIN building_block_instance parent ON parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id SET bbi.root_building_block_instance_id = COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL

UPDATE building_block_instance bbi INNER JOIN building_block_instance parent ON parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id SET bbi.root_building_block_instance_id = COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL

UPDATE building_block_instance bbi INNER JOIN building_block_instance parent ON parent.id = bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id SET bbi.root_building_block_instance_id = COALESCE(parent.root_building_block_instance_id, parent.id) WHERE bbi.parent_building_block_instance_id IS NOT NULL AND bbi.root_building_block_instance_id IS NULL
